series_metadata.series_description: File contains Ohio Fire Academy Course Curriculum including the Instructor Lesson Plan and Student Manual.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable records have been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy. ; Microform: Retain for seven years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain electronic data fifty years., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Shred
